$comment: Seed registry. Update this file every time a tool is added, changed, or retired. Tool Manager Agent reads/writes this.

tools.name: fact_check_tool
tools.description: Wraps web search/fetch with the channel's fixed source-priority ranking.
tools.provider: Anthropic web_search tool or equivalent search API

tools.name: elevenlabs_voice_tool
tools.description: Provider-agnostic voiceover generation wrapper; default provider ElevenLabs Studio.
tools.input_schema_ref: text: string, voice_id: string, chapter: string

tools.name: image_gen_tool
tools.description: Provider-agnostic image generation wrapper. Default: fal.ai + Flux schnell (real API, near-free at test volume). Leonardo/Replicate as fallback. Midjourney excluded from automation (no official API).

tools.name: remotion_assembly_tool
tools.description: Programmatic video assembly: audio + images + timing + subtitles + effects.
tools.input_schema_ref: scenes: object[], audio_track: string, subtitle_track: string

tools.name: youtube_publish_tool
tools.description: Wraps YouTube Data API v3 upload + metadata; publish call is human-gated.

tools.name: seo_export_tool
tools.description: Formats SEO Agent's structured output into Templates/SEO.md.

tools.name: github_sync_tool
tools.description: Checks/updates tool_registry.json and commits studio changes to GitHub.
